CLAUDECODE_ENABLED.description: Enable Claude Code AI agent integration. Must be enabled for child plugins (claudecodeextract, claudecodecleanup) to work.

CLAUDECODE_BINARY.description: Path to Claude Code CLI binary

CLAUDECODE_TIMEOUT.description: Timeout for Claude Code operations in seconds

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Claude Code authentication

CLAUDECODE_MODEL.description: Claude model to use (e.g. sonnet, opus, haiku)

CLAUDECODE_MAX_TURNS.description: Maximum number of agentic turns per invocation
